payload.command: echo '== before =='; df -h /tmp; TMP=$(mktemp -d /tmp/dwarf-diskfill.XXXXXX); echo "temp_dir=$TMP"; echo '== writing 256 MB =='; dd if=/dev/zero of="$TMP/fill" bs=1M count=256 2>&1; echo '== after =='; df -h /tmp; ls -lh "$TMP"; echo '== cleanup =='; rm -rf "$TMP"; df -h /tmp
